feedItems.description: allocated £87.7m to Children's Social Care (≈£248 per resident)
allocated £38.0m to Environment & Streets (≈£107 per resident)
allocated £163.5m to Adult Social Care (≈£462 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £105 (5.2%) to £2133
